svg.title: API Versioning Trade-offs Comparison
svg.desc: Comprehensive comparison of four API versioning strategies with decision framework showing when to choose URI Path, Query Parameter, Header-based, or Content Negotiation
svg.text: Comparing discoverability, cacheability, RESTful purity, and implementation complexity across strategies
Decision Framework: When to Choose Which Strategy
Is public API with external consumers?
1. Public APIs: URI Path (discoverability + CDN wins)
4. Never mix strategies: pick one and enforce at gateway level
5. Always plan deprecation: sunset header + timeline communication
